mainEntity.name: What is UCaaS and how does VestaCall help?

acceptedAnswer.text: UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) is a cloud-based phone system that integrates voice, messaging, video, and AI communication tools into one platform. VestaCall provides enterprise-grade UCaaS with 99.999% uptime, global coverage, and AI-powered features at a fraction of traditional costs.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to set up VestaCall?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can create an account and port your existing numbers entirely online in under 5 minutes. Our onboarding is completely self-serve with zero-code CRM integrations for Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zendesk.
Absolutely. We offer local, mobile, and toll-free numbers in over 100 countries. Our global voice termination network ensures crystal-clear calls with high ASR and low PDD metrics worldwide.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between VestaCall and RingCentral?

acceptedAnswer.text: Unlike RingCentral, VestaCall includes AI-powered features (sentiment analysis, AI receptionist) at no extra cost, offers 1-second billing precision vs. 60-second rounding, provides unlimited SIP trunking channels, and guarantees 99.999% uptime with financial penalties.

mainEntity.name: Is VestaCall HIPAA and GDPR compliant?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. VestaCall is SOC 2 Type II certified, HIPAA compliant for healthcare, GDPR compliant for European data protection, and PCI DSS compliant for payment processing. Your data is encrypted end-to-end.
